description: Political organization and criminal gang of conservative Shia Iraqis in Western Europe, founded in Germany by Mohammed Bunia. Modeled after a motorcycle club, it threatens secular Iraqis in Europe and is ideologically linked to the Iraqi Shia militia Sarāyā al-Salām. Active in Germany, Sweden, Denmark, and the Netherlands.

country_links.evidence_quote: Gang members are known in Germany, Sweden, Denmark and the Netherlands.
country_links.context: Gang members are known to be present in Denmark.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang was founded by the style of a motorcycle club by Mohammed Bunia in Germany.
country_links.context: The gang was founded in Germany and has members there; German police raided properties linked to the gang.

country_links.context: Gang members are known to be present in the Netherlands.
